task_completion.description: Verify the agent queries the 'tutorial' index for web access logs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Splunk search bar contains 'index=tutorial' or 'index="tutorial"'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent calculates the purchase conversion rate (Purchases / Adds).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Splunk search bar contains a command dividing purchases by adds (e.g., using 'eval' or 'stats'), or the results table clearly shows a column representing the calculated conversion rate.

task_completion.description: Verify the analysis is grouped by the product category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Splunk search bar contains 'by categoryId' or the results table has 'categoryId' as the primary grouping column.

task_completion.description: Verify the analysis is saved as a report named 'Category_Conversion_Rate'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Splunk page showing a saved report titled exactly 'Category_Conversion_Rate', either in the Reports list, a save confirmation dialog, or as the active report view.

task_completion.description: Verify a new dashboard named 'Business_KPI_Dashboard' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Splunk page showing a dashboard titled exactly 'Business_KPI_Dashboard', either in the Dashboards list or as the active dashboard view.

task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard displays the conversion rate analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Business_KPI_Dashboard' contains a panel (table, chart, or single value) that displays the conversion rate data grouped by categoryId.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Splunk Web UI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Splunk web interface in a web browser, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the results are generated from actual log data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dashboard or report shows a populated table or chart with multiple categories and calculated numeric values, not an empty panel or a hardcoded text block.

integrity.description: Verify the dashboard was actually created within the Splunk application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dashboard is viewed within the authentic Splunk UI (showing Splunk navigation bars and menus), not a locally created HTML file opened in the browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target index: 'tutorial'. Grouping field: 'categoryId'. Expected report name: 'Category_Conversion_Rate'. Expected dashboard name: 'Business_KPI_Dashboard'. Splunk credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!.
